name: Spice Cakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the egg and add the sour milk, sugar, and nutmeg.
2. Sift together the flour, baking soda, and salt.
3. Add the sifted ingredients to the egg mixture.
4. Mix in the melted shortening until well combined.
5. Pour the batter onto a hot griddle or skillet.
6. Cook the cakes on a breakfast plate-sized portion.
7. Arrange several cakes together on a hot plate.
8. Spread each cake generously with butter.
9. Sprinkle with cinnamon or nutmeg if desired.
10. Serve by cutting through the whole thing in a pie fashion.
8 servings. Florence Taft Eaton, Concord, MA.
